title: Suwimut 3 Pack Glass Jar with Airtight Cork Lid Ball, Clear Candy Jar Mason Jars Food Storage Canister with Seal Wood Cork Round for Serving Spice Sugar Salt Tea, 500ML, 900ML, 1200ML
features: Clear glass canisters are great for storing and preserving a variety of ingredients including preserves, jams, chutneys, rice, sugar, flour, tea, coffee, herbs, spices, biscuits, etc. In addition, there are various dried flowers, such as dried lavender flowers and rosebuds.
Sealing with cork round ball, cut off from the outside keep your food fresh. Isolation of dust and little bugs, allowing you to fill the bottle and keep the contents fresh for a long time.

Glass storage jars are made of high borosilicate glass, more thinner, lighter, capable of withstanding thermal shock, scratch, and break resistant. The cork round ball lid is made from natural wood and create you a healthy life.
High transparency, You can see the stuffs inside at a glance. Superior resistant to use and dishwashing guarantees long lasting product.

Home and kitchen food storage tank, save your food and time. 500ML, 900ML and 1200ML Capacity; 3.7 x 3.7 x 5.7 inches(9 x 9 x 14cm); 3.7 x 3.7 x 7.8 inches (9 x 9 x 20cm); 3.7 x 3.7 x 9.8 inches(9 x 9 x 25cm).
